28	// Resolve produces a sealed ResolvedConfig by layering overrides onto
29	// cfg. Overrides are applied as last-write-wins per field. The
30	// returned ResolvedConfig does not alias cfg's storage — every map
31	// and slice is deep-cloned via per-type Clone methods before being
32	// captured.
33	//
34	// Resolve accepts a nil cfg and returns a ResolvedConfig populated
35	// from package defaults, sealed normally.
36	func (c *NewConfig) Resolve(overrides CLIOverrides) ResolvedConfig {
37		r := ResolvedConfig{sealed: true}
38	
39		r.assignee = overrides.Assignee
40		r.reviewMaxRetries = c.ResolveReviewMaxRetries()
41	
42		var agent *AgentConfig
43		var workers *WorkersConfig
44		if c != nil {
45			agent = c.Agent.Clone()
46			workers = c.Workers
47		}
48	
49		r.noProgressCooldown = workers.ResolveNoProgressCooldown()
50		r.maxNoChangesBeforeClose = workers.ResolveMaxNoChangesBeforeClose()
51		r.heartbeatInterval = workers.ResolveHeartbeatInterval()
52	
53		r.harness = overrides.Harness

55			r.harness = agent.Harness
56		}
57	
58		r.model = overrides.Model

61		}

72			r.permissions = agent.Permissions
73		}

76			r.timeout = *overrides.Timeout
77		} else if agent != nil && agent.TimeoutMS > 0 {
78			r.timeout = time.Duration(agent.TimeoutMS) * time.Millisecond
79		}
80	
81		r.evidenceCaps = c.ResolveEvidenceCaps(r.harness)
82	
83		r.contextBudget = overrides.ContextBudget
84		if r.contextBudget == "" && c != nil {
85			r.contextBudget = c.EvidenceCaps.ResolveContextBudget()

88		if agent != nil {
89			r.sessionLogDir = agent.SessionLogDir

105			}

108		if c != nil && c.Executions != nil && c.Executions.Mirror != nil {
109			r.mirrorConfig = c.Executions.Mirror.Clone()
110		}
111	
112		return r
113	}

115	// LoadAndResolve is the canonical production entry point that produces
116	// a sealed ResolvedConfig. It loads the project's .ddx/config.yaml from
117	// projectRoot, layers overrides on top, and returns the immutable
118	// ResolvedConfig.
119	//
120	// On load error, LoadAndResolve still returns a usable, sealed
121	// ResolvedConfig populated from package defaults plus the supplied
122	// overrides, alongside the underlying error. Callers decide whether to
123	// surface the error or proceed with the defaults-backed config.
124	//
125	// If projectRoot is empty, the process working directory is used.
126	func LoadAndResolve(projectRoot string, overrides CLIOverrides) (ResolvedConfig, error) {
127		cfg, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(projectRoot)
128		if err != nil {
129			return DefaultNewConfig().Resolve(overrides), err
130		}
131		return cfg.Resolve(overrides), nil
132	}
133

87	// AgentRunRuntime is the SD-024 successor to RunOptions for the agent
88	// run path. Durable knobs (Harness, Model, Provider, ModelRef, Effort,
89	// Permissions, Timeout, WallClock, SessionLogDir) are stripped — they
90	// live on config.ResolvedConfig and are passed via RunWithConfig's
91	// rcfg argument. Only non-serializable plumbing and per-invocation
92	// runtime intent remain.

101		Record                bool
102		Replay                bool
103		WorkDir               string
104		EstimatedPromptTokens int

107	}

42	// serverPromptCapBytes caps the size of inline prompt bodies accepted on
43	// server-side ingress (POST /api/agent/run). FEAT-022 §9 / Stage D2. It is
44	// a package-level variable rather than a literal so tests can lower the
45	// cap without writing multi-MB request bodies. Production callers must not
46	// mutate it.
47	var serverPromptCapBytes = evidence.DefaultMaxPromptBytes
48	
49	// serverInlineCapBytes caps inline content bodies returned on egress paths
50	// — MCP tool responses and REST JSON responses that carry library-doc,
51	// execution-bundle, diff, session, or persona text. FEAT-022 §10 / §11.
52	// Stage E1. Package-level variable so tests can lower the cap; production
53	// callers must not mutate it.
54	var serverInlineCapBytes = evidence.DefaultMaxInlinedFileBytes
55

58	// OriginalBytes fields are always populated (false/len(text) when the body

60	// site in this package — every other caller must route through this helper

data.text: Migrated both `agent.RunOptions` constructors in `cli/internal/server/server.go` (handleAgentDispatch at line 1913 and mcpAgentDispatch at line 3786) to use `config.LoadAndResolve` + `agent.AgentRunRuntime` + `agent.RunWithConfigViaService`. Build, lint, and server tests all pass; commit `e02fc04`.
